label: Inventory stock group
description: Defines a named group of interchangeable ThingDefs that pawns automatically restock and carry, such as the Medicine group used by the auto-restock system.

thingDefs.label: Thing defs
thingDefs.description: ThingDefs that are interchangeable members of this stock group.

min.label: Min
min.description: Minimum quantity of this stock group a pawn should carry.

max.label: Max
max.description: Maximum quantity of this stock group a pawn should carry.

defaultThingDef.label: Default thing def
defaultThingDef.description: ThingDef used when restocking without a more specific preference. Should be one of the entries in thingDefs; falls back to the first entry in thingDefs if unset.

new-inventory-stock-group.label: New inventory stock group
new-inventory-stock-group.description: Minimal inventory stock group with a def name, label, and member thing defs.
